subcodes.first_line: As to the account of pardon and forgiveness, after presentation before the Presence, these verses were revealed - His exalted Word: O Samandar! [3.5s]... ...As to the children: We have directed that in the beginning they should be trained in the observances and laws of religion
subcodes.first_line_orig: و اما حکایت عفو و مغفرت بعد از عرض امام وجه این آیات نازل قوله تعالی یا سمندر
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @law of Huququ'llah, @business; financial; property matters, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
